fields.label: Targets
fields.help: Named HTTP targets to benchmark. Use one for single-target runs, two or more for N-way comparison.

fields.label: Settings
fields.help: Runtime settings controlling iterations, concurrency, timeouts, and optional features.

fields.label: Payloads
fields.help: HTTP request specifications to execute against each target.

fields.label: Name
fields.help: Display name for this target (e.g. "production", "candidate").

fields.label: Base URL
fields.help: Base URL for the target service (e.g. "http://localhost:8080").

fields.label: Git Branch
fields.help: Git branch to switch to before benchmarking this target. Leave empty to skip git switching.

fields.label: Lifecycle Hooks
fields.help: Optional setup/teardown commands and health check for this target.

fields.label: Setup Command
fields.help: Shell command to run before benchmarking this target.

fields.label: Teardown Command
fields.help: Shell command to run after benchmarking this target.

fields.label: Health Check
fields.help: Health check to poll before benchmarking starts.

fields.label: Command
fields.help: Shell command to execute (run via /bin/sh -c).

fields.label: Timeout (seconds)
fields.help: Maximum time to wait for the command to finish.

fields.label: Working Directory
fields.help: Working directory for the command. Defaults to the current directory.

fields.label: URL
fields.help: URL to poll for health check readiness.

fields.label: Timeout (seconds)
fields.help: Total polling budget in seconds.

fields.label: Poll Interval (ms)
fields.help: Delay between health check polls in milliseconds.

fields.label: Iterations
fields.help: Number of HTTP requests to execute per payload per target.

fields.label: Concurrency
fields.help: Maximum number of concurrent HTTP requests.

fields.label: Secrets File
fields.help: Path to a file containing the Bearer token for authenticated endpoints.

fields.label: Max Connections
fields.help: HTTP connection pool size.

fields.label: Request Timeout
fields.help: Per-request timeout in seconds.

fields.label: Retry Settings
fields.help: Retry configuration for failed HTTP requests.

fields.label: Warmup Settings
fields.help: Warmup configuration before benchmark runs.

fields.label: Log Level
fields.help: Logging verbosity.

fields.label: Tempo Settings
fields.help: Optional Grafana Tempo integration for distributed trace analysis.

fields.label: Load Mode
fields.help: Load control mode for pacing request dispatch.

fields.label: Max Attempts
fields.help: Maximum number of retry attempts.

fields.label: Initial Delay (ms)
fields.help: Initial delay in milliseconds before the first retry.

fields.label: Backoff Multiplier
fields.help: Delay multiplier for exponential backoff.

fields.label: Warmup Iterations
fields.help: Number of warmup requests per endpoint before the benchmark starts.

fields.label: Tempo URL
fields.help: Base URL for the Grafana Tempo instance.

fields.label: Service Name
fields.help: Service name to filter traces by.

fields.label: Enabled
fields.help: Whether Tempo integration is enabled. Defaults to true when the tempo section is present.

fields.label: Auth Token
fields.help: Optional Bearer token for authenticating with Tempo.

variants.label: Unthrottled
variants.help: No throttling — fire requests as fast as concurrency allows.

variants.label: Constant RPM
variants.help: Pace iterations at a fixed requests-per-minute rate.

fields.label: Target RPM
fields.help: Requests per minute to maintain.

variants.label: Ramp Up
variants.help: Linearly increase RPM from a starting rate to an ending rate over a duration.

fields.label: Start RPM
fields.help: Initial requests per minute.

fields.label: End RPM
fields.help: Final requests per minute.

fields.label: Duration (seconds)
fields.help: Total ramp-up duration in seconds.

variants.label: Step Load
variants.help: Sequential steps, each with its own RPM and duration.

fields.label: Steps
fields.help: Ordered list of load steps to execute.

variants.label: Poisson RPM
variants.help: Poisson-distributed load at an average requests-per-minute rate.

fields.label: Target RPM
fields.help: Average requests per minute (Poisson-distributed inter-arrival times).

fields.label: RPM
fields.help: Target requests per minute for this step.

fields.label: Duration (seconds)
fields.help: How long this step lasts in seconds.

fields.label: Name
fields.help: Display name for this payload (e.g. "List Users", "Create Order").

fields.label: HTTP Method
fields.help: HTTP method to use for this request.

fields.label: Path
fields.help: URL path appended to the target base URL.

fields.label: Request Body
fields.help: JSON request body. Only applicable for POST, PUT, PATCH methods.

fields.label: Headers
fields.help: Custom HTTP headers as key-value pairs.

fields.label: Validation
fields.help: Optional validation rules applied to every response from this endpoint.

fields.label: Expected Status Code
fields.help: Expected HTTP status code (e.g. 200, 201).

fields.label: Field Assertions
fields.help: Map from JSON dot-path (e.g. "$.user.id") to an assertion on the field value.

variants.label: Present
variants.help: Assert the field exists (any value, including null).

variants.label: Equals
variants.help: Assert the field has an exact JSON value.

variants.label: Null
variants.help: Assert the field is explicitly null.

variants.label: Not Null
variants.help: Assert the field exists and is not null.

variants.label: Type Check
variants.help: Assert the JSON type of the field.

variants.label: Regex Match
variants.help: Assert a string field matches a POSIX ERE regex pattern.

variants.label: Numeric Range
variants.help: Assert a numeric field is within [min, max]. Both bounds are optional.

variants.label: Array Length
variants.help: Assert an array has exactly N elements.

variants.label: Array Contains
variants.help: Assert a value is present in an array.

fields.label: Minimum
fields.help: Lower bound (inclusive). Leave empty for no lower bound.

fields.label: Maximum
fields.help: Upper bound (inclusive). Leave empty for no upper bound.
